name: Shrimp-And-Leek Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped leeks (white and green parts)
1½ tablespoons Assorted minced fresh herbs (parsley, chives, thyme, oregano, basil, etc.)
2 Ripe plum tomatoes, thinly sliced and seeded
¼ pound Fresh medium-sized shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Using 1 tablespoon of the oil, sauté the leeks over high heat for 1 minute. Season with salt and pepper lightly.
3. Blend the goat cheese, garlic, and 1 tablespoon of the herbs together with a fork.
4. Brush the rolled-out pizza dough with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
5. Spread the leeks over the dough. Sprinkle with the goat cheese and top with a layer of tomato slices.
6. Bake the pizzas for 8 minutes.
7. Add the shrimp to the pizzas and continue baking for the final 7-to-8 minutes.
8. To serve, drizzle with remaining olive oil.
